prompt:
Fresh aquarium liquid test readings displayed in three clear test vials on a clean bench: each vial contains a different tinted solution (subtle yellow-green, pale pink, and warm orange) representing separate water parameters. A fourth small vial or a beaker of rinse water sits nearby, along with a plastic pipette and a folded reference card kept deliberately blurry so no text is readable. The scene communicates “measured and recorded values” through orderly setup and freshly capped, spotless vials.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a near-future solarpunk lab vibe: soft, diffused lighting, clean glass reflections, no logos, no readable markings, and no on-image text. Keep the vials prominent and centered, with a simple background so it reads well as an inventory icon.
